existing_features.title: Save the uploaded image 'Brown_Retro_Book_Store_Logo_20260224_180351_0000-removebg-preview.png' as a static asset at 'frontend/public/assets/generated/book-store-logo.png' and use it as the logo image source in every location where a logo is currently displayed: Navigation (desktop and mobile Sheet menu), Footer, ProfileSetupModal, and BooksPage hero banner.
